title: Janus Bonn

{{Quote|My orders are not to be questioned! If you ever hesitate again when I make a command, you will not live to fail me a third time.|Captain Janus Bonn|<ref name="GoA" />}}
'''Janus Bonn''' was a Human male [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and a native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]]. He was the son of a wealthy [[Noble/Legends|noble]], attending the best schools and eventually volunteering for service to the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] upon graduation. Rising through the ranks, he became an adjutant to the [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Lord Vader: Operation Yavin Kill Two is proceeding according to your plan. This message is to inform you that the Rebel operatives known as the Heroes of Yavin have arrived at Mining Outpost 11 and will shortly be proceeding to Asteroid 7785. We look forward to your imminent arrival and will continue to go ahead as planned.|Captain Janus Bonn, in a holocall message to Lord Darth Vader|<ref name="GoA" />}}
Janus Bonn was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core World]] [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]], the son of a wealthy [[Noble/Legends|noble]]. Immersed in the [[High Human Culture/Legends|Human High Culture]] philosophy espoused by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], he attended the best [[University/Legends|university]] available to him, graduating with honors. Upon graduation, he volunteered to serve in the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]]. As a young [[Officer/Legends|officer]], Bonn was assigned as an adjutant to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]],<ref name="GoA:V2" /> the [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]],<ref name="kenner">{{KennerCite|set=Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (toy line)|pack=Darth Vader vs. Prince Xizor|link=soteKxizor-vader.asp}}</ref> and his rise through the ranks of the military bore similarities to the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord's]] own ascension; he utilized displays of power, deceit, and even [[Death/Legends|murder]]<ref name="GoA" /> to distinguish himself in a relatively short career.<ref name="GoA:V2" /> Bonn was promoted to the rank of [[Captain/Legends|captain]] around the same time that [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] Vader was assigned to assist [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] and the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] project.<ref name="GoA" />

Following the disastrous [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the demise of [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] Tarkin, Lord Vader's commission was expanded and he found himself at the helm of [[Death Squadron/Legends|Death Squadron]],<ref name="Imperial Sourcebook2">''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''</ref> an [[Fleet/Legends|armada]] charged with tracking down the elusive [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Fleet]].<ref name="ESB">{{Film|V}}</ref> During this time, Lord Vader instructed Captain Bonn to prepare a [[Operation Yavin Kill Two|trap]] for the [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Heroes of Yavin]] in the [[Alderaan system/Legends|Alderaan system]], using rumors that the [[Royal Palace of Alderaan/Legends|Aldera Royal Palace]] had been found intact in the [[The Graveyard|debris field]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]], and that [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]] [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Prestor Organa]] was also alive within. With two [[Platoon/Legends|platoons]] of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] at his beck and call, Bonn waited at [[Mining Outpost 11]] in the Alderaan system for the Heroes of Yavin to arrive, knowing that Vader would follow in pursuit. The captain's endgame was simple; when the Rebels arrived, he was to ensure that they did not leave until his master made his inevitable appearance.<ref name="GoA" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|At long last, the hated Skywalker will be yours, as well as Princess Leia and the outlaw Han Solo. I await your presence and your bidding, my master.|Captain Janus Bonn|<ref name="GoA" />}}
Bonn was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], who stood 1.8 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall. He maintained a thick goatee beard, and was possessed of cold, dead eyes that intimidated his underlings. His stare, combined with his efficient and emotionless attitude, earned him the nickname of "The Dead Man" from his [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]]. His cold, unemotional behavior was a façade, however;<ref name="GoA" /> inside, Bonn was a seething pit of evil, fear, hatred and violence. When pressed, his composure would slip. The revelation of his true nature was enough for doubt to be cast on his sanity.<ref name="GoA:V2" />

Captain Bonn was a fanatical supporter of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and his [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], and was doggedly loyal to Lord Vader.<ref name="GoA:V2" /> Despite his allegiance to the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], he did not believe in, or respect, the notion of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. He respected results, something his master excelled at, the defeat at [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] notwithstanding.<ref name="GoA" /> When given a mission objective from the Dark Lord of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], Bonn treated it as the most important thing. To fail in his assignment would invalidate any meaning in his life.<ref name="GoA:V2" /> Captain Bonn was one of the few officers, along with [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Daine Jir/Legends|Daine Jir]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Maximilian Veers]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Firmus Piett/Legends|Firmus Piett]], [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Erv Lekauf]], [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admirals]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] and [[Demetrius Zaarin]], who Lord Vader respected.<ref name="I96">{{InsiderCite|96|The Empire's Finest: Who's Who in the Imperial Military}}</ref><ref name="TOSVC67">{{StarshipsVehiclesCite|67|Welcome On Board}}</ref>

==Equipment==
Bonn wore a standard [[Imperial officer's uniform/Legends|Imperial officer's uniform]], carried a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]], and was armed with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] and [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]].<ref name="GoA" />

==Appearances==
